channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump urges more countries to normalize ties with Israel in any Iran agreement
item.description: President Trump's new demand dampens hopes for a swift Iran war deal. An Iranian delegation has arrived in D...

item.title: Pope Leo criticizes big tech in comprehensive encyclical on artificial intelligence
item.description: "Magnifica Humanitas" addresses the social, economic, and political challenges posed by artificial intelligence.

item.title: Trump scheduled for routine annual medical exam seven months after last Walter Reed visit
item.description: White House highlights Trump's excellent health amid scrutiny over the health of the oldest president to take office.

item.title: In Beirut, refugee girls and women gain more than self-defense through martial arts
item.description: In Lebanon's male-dominated Palestinian refugee camps, a martial arts teacher empowers women through self-defense training.
